tictactoe.name: Tic-Tac-Toe
tictactoe.description: Classic 3×3 grid. Get three in a row to win.
tictactoe.how_to_play:
Players take turns placing their mark (X or O) on the 3×3 grid.
The first player to get 3 in a row — horizontally, vertically, or diagonally — wins.
If all 9 squares are filled and nobody has won, the game is a draw.
